name: Songkick API
description: The Songkick API provides easy access to the biggest live music database in the world with over 6 million upcoming and past concerts. Search for events by artist, date, venue, and location, access user's events and trackings, complete concert history for artists (gigography), event details, venue details, similar artists, and more.
